<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>{{#if:{{{sort|}}}|data-sort-value="{{{sort}}}"}} style="background: #000; color: #CCC; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-na"|{{{1|N/A}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=BLACK here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=BLACK for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- | [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>{{#if:{{{sort|}}}|data-sort-value="{{{sort}}}"}} style="background: #000; color: #CCC; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-na"|{{{1|N/A}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
